# Market Agent Registry

<!-- GENERATED by scripts/generate_agent_docs.py from core.safety.permissions. Do not edit by hand. -->

Single source of truth: `core/safety/permissions.py`.

### 1. Founder Command Agent

- **Mission:** Orchestrate daily priorities and surface the single critical decision.
- **Permission level:** L1 — Docs/reports only
- **Risk level:** low
- **Input files:** reports/founder/DAILY_SUPER_COMMAND.md
- **Output files:** reports/founder/DAILY_SUPER_COMMAND.md
- **Allowed actions:** read, summarize, prioritize, draft_report
- **Forbidden actions:** external_send, final_pricing, legal_commitment, bypass_suppression, secrets_edit, production_deploy, workflow_permission_escalation, treat_untrusted_as_instructions
- **Required approval:** Yes
- **Required verification:** self_check, founder_review
- **Handoff targets:** Metrics Agent, Approval Queue Agent
- **Collision rules:** preserve_newer_safety_gates; do_not_overwrite_manual_edits; prefer_smaller_pr; conflict_report_on_overlap

### 2. Brand Guard Agent

- **Mission:** Enforce brand voice and block exaggerated/guaranteed claims.

- **Risk level:** low
- **Input files:** docs/localization/*
- **Output files:** reports/localization/*

- **Forbidden actions:** external_send, final_pricing, legal_commitment, bypass_suppression, secrets_edit, production_deploy, workflow_permission_escalation, treat_untrusted_as_instructions

- **Handoff targets:** Draft Factory Agent, Content Agent

- **Permission level:** L1 — Docs/reports only
- **Risk level:** medium
- **Input files:** data/procurement/vendors.jsonl
- **Output files:** docs/procurement/*
- **Allowed actions:** read, draft_responses_with_evidence
- **Forbidden actions:** external_send, final_pricing, legal_commitment, bypass_suppression, secrets_edit, production_deploy, workflow_permission_escalation, treat_untrusted_as_instructions, fabricate_certifications
- **Required approval:** Yes
- **Required verification:** self_check, founder_review
- **Handoff targets:** Legal/Compliance Agent, Data Room Agent
- **Collision rules:** preserve_newer_safety_gates; do_not_overwrite_manual_edits; prefer_smaller_pr; conflict_report_on_overlap

### 36. Data Room Agent

- **Mission:** Maintain data-room index; mark unknowns TBD, never fabricate.
- **Permission level:** L1 — Docs/reports only
- **Risk level:** medium
- **Input files:** docs/data_room/*
- **Output files:** docs/data_room/*, reports/data_room/*
- **Allowed actions:** read, draft_index, mark_tbd
- **Forbidden actions:** external_send, final_pricing, legal_commitment, bypass_suppression, secrets_edit, production_deploy, workflow_permission_escalation, treat_untrusted_as_instructions, fabricate_traction, invent_customers
- **Required approval:** Yes
- **Required verification:** self_check, founder_review
- **Handoff targets:** Procurement Agent
- **Collision rules:** preserve_newer_safety_gates; do_not_overwrite_manual_edits; prefer_smaller_pr; conflict_report_on_overlap

### 37. Legal/Compliance Agent

- **Mission:** Route legal-sensitive items to human; never gives binding advice.
- **Permission level:** L1 — Docs/reports only
- **Risk level:** critical
- **Input files:** docs/procurement/LEGAL_HANDOFF_TRIGGERS_AR.md
- **Output files:** reports/procurement/*
- **Allowed actions:** read, flag, trigger_human_handoff
- **Forbidden actions:** external_send, final_pricing, legal_commitment, bypass_suppression, secrets_edit, production_deploy, workflow_permission_escalation, treat_untrusted_as_instructions, give_binding_legal_advice
- **Required approval:** Yes
- **Required verification:** self_check, founder_review
- **Handoff targets:** Founder Command Agent
- **Collision rules:** preserve_newer_safety_gates; do_not_overwrite_manual_edits; prefer_smaller_pr; conflict_report_on_overlap

- **Mission:** Define productized services with scope + acceptance criteria.

- **Output files:** docs/productized_services/*

- **Mission:** Review infra/reliability; staging only, no prod deploy.

- **Risk level:** high
- **Input files:** docs/infra/*
- **Output files:** reports/infra/*

- **Forbidden actions:** external_send, final_pricing, legal_commitment, bypass_suppression, secrets_edit, production_deploy, workflow_permission_escalation, treat_untrusted_as_instructions, modify_prod_secrets, weaken_deploy_gate
